settings.text: Sign up for a JPS Club Tourist membership and get a special discount code of up to 15% for shopping at Jaspal.com. This promotion is valid from6 January - 31 December 2025.

HOW TO GET A SPECIAL OFFER

  • Sign up for JPS Club for Tourist membership or login here
  • Get a discount code for placing orders at Jaspal.com in the 'My Rewards' section. Learn how to use the reward catalog here
  • Customers must be members of the Jaspal.com website and log in before placing an order.
  • Enter the discount code on the payment page for a discount of up to 15%.
  • 10% discount code for regular-priced items (no minimum spend).
  • 15% discount code for regular-priced items (minimum spend of 3,500 baht).
  • The promotion is limited to 12 rights/code/account.
  • This discount only applies to international shipping methods (outside Thailand).

TERMS AND CONDITIONS APPLY

  • By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: https://www.jaspal.com/policies/terms-of-service
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
    Shipping cost is not included.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at https://www.jaspal.com/policies/refund-policy
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
